description_long: This football features a unique design with a predominantly white surface, overlaid with black landmass shapes reminiscent of a world map. Vivid green and blue brushstroke-like markings add a modern, artistic flair, with the green concentrated over North America and blue streaks across the northern hemisphere and Pacific region. The continents are sharply defined, creating a striking contrast against the white background. There are also blue, hand-drawn style scribbles and signatures on the surface, enhancing its customized appearance. The ball appears to be made of synthetic leather, typical for modern footballs, and is likely air-filled for optimal play. No visible branding or league logos are present, and the panel pattern is not clearly distinguishable due to the graphic overlay.
description: A white football with black world map continents, accented by green and blue brushstrokes and blue signature-like scribbles.
description_view_0: The Americas are prominently displayed with green brushstrokes over North America and blue scribbles in the lower left.
description_view_1: Europe, Africa, and the Middle East are visible, with the black landmasses sharply contrasting the white surface and minimal colored markings.
description_view_2: Asia and Australia are shown in black, with blue brushstrokes along the upper right, and no green markings visible.
description_view_3: The Pacific Ocean dominates, with bold blue brushstrokes and a blue signature on the lower right, while green is only faintly visible at the edge.
